---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# Tau-density spatial profile across cortical-section distance, WT vs Arp3 KO

## What this file does

Reads per-section Tau-intensity profiles across cortical-section distance
for WT and Arp3 KO genotypes. The profiles are aligned by position,
averaged, and plotted as a line plot of mean Tau intensity vs distance with
a mean +/- SD ribbon overlay (`geom_ribbon` at line 75, `geom_line` at
line 76). One PDF is written (`ggsave` at line 100).

## Manuscript panel

**Fig 4f**: "Tau density. N = 3 WT and 3 Arp3 KO sections of 3 experiments.
*p < 0.05 by Two-tailed paired Wilcoxon test."

Source Data: `Fig 4f`.

## Outputs

- One line-plot PDF (`ggsave` at line 100).

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure 4_Arp3KO/Fig. 4f/CorticalSection_Tau_Fig.4f/Neurite activity corr.Rmd
(name was misleading — this is a spatial line-profile analysis, not the
neurite-velocity cross-correlation analysis the original filename suggests.)
-->

## Package installation


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
library(gdata)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Tau_int <- Tau_int %>% as.data.frame()


summary_1 <-Tau_int %>% group_by(Sec_no) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Mean)
summary_1 <- summary_1[ ,c(1,11)]

write.csv(summary_1, "summary.csv")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df2 <- Ch3 %>% as.data.frame()

df2$distance <- (0:(nrow(df1)-1))*0.0425013

stacked <- df2 %>% gather(Roi, int, -distance) %>% as.data.table()  

df_summary3 <-stacked %>% group_by(distance) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(int)
```


```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(df_summary2, aes(x=distance, y=mean)) +
  
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="lightgrey")+
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=1) +
  
  #stat_peaks(colour = "red", span = 21, ignore_threshold = 0.8) +
  #stat_peaks(geom = "text", colour = "red", span = 21, ignore_threshold = 0.8, hjust = 2, angle = 0) +
  #stat_valleys(colour = "lightblue", span = 21, ignore_threshold = 1) +
  #stat_valleys(geom = "text", colour = "blue", span = 21, ignore_threshold = 1, hjust = -0.5, angle = 0) +
  
  
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8), limits = c(0, 15)) +
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```



```{r}
ggsave(
  "Actin_profile.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```


```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)

```
